description: Your SOC team needs to ensure that critical log feeds do not silently fail. Using the Splunk web interface (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!), create a log source health monitoring system in the Search & Reporting app. Create a saved report named 'Log_Source_Health_Report' showing event ingestion volume over the last 24 hours grouped by index for at least two of the critical indexes: security_logs, web_logs, and system_logs. Additionally, create and enable a scheduled alert named 'Log_Source_Silence_Alert' to run every hour (cron: 0 * * * *) that detects if any of the three critical indexes (security_logs, web_logs, and system_logs) have received zero or abnormally few events in the last 60 minutes.
